title: sorbus cuspidata
intro: Sorbus cuspidata, also known as the Korean whitebeam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Sorbus cuspidata can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
